title: James Bond Candidate Louis Partridge Says He Never Pictured Himself as 007 But Says It’s ‘Wonderful’ to Be In Contention
content:
ByAntonio Ferme

When Netflix released the first “Enola Holmes” in 2020, audiences watched “Stranger Things” starMillie Bobby Brownreinvent herself as the eccentric, fourth-wall-breaking detective. They also met a breakout newcomer:Louis Partridge.

Six years later, at the world premiere of “Enola Holmes 3,” Partridge says he’s learned to navigate fame “in various ways, sometimes better than others.”

“The social media stuff can get a bit noisy sometimes, but it’s important to have good people around you — and to figure out for yourself what’s important outside of looking at your phone, to be honest, which is surprisingly hard to do these days. I’m not gonna lie,” Partridge toldVarietyThursday night. “It sounds silly to say, but that’s quite tricky to do today.”Since becoming an international star, Partridge has shared the screen with industry heavyweights like Cate Blanchett, landed a partnership with Prada and entered a high-profile relationship with Olivia Rodrigo. Looking back, he says he never expected so much attention on his personal life.“I did not, but it’s a part of the job and I’m grateful to feel like I’m on the right path,” he explained. “I feel good about where I’m at. I’ve got more to do.”

That “more to do,” staying on the theme of uncertainty, includes a coveted role he never imagined Hollywood would one day consider him for:James Bond. Asked whether he’d ever pictured himself in the conversation to play 007, Partridge replied, “No, no. Not yet at least. But that’s something to keep in mind. I wonder what Variety thinks?”

Well, to answer Partridge’s question,VarietyLondon Bureau Chief Alex Ritmanreported in Aprilthat he’s one of several actors in contention for the job, aligning him with the widespread industry chatter that Amazon MGM Studios is searching for a “fresh-faced” British 007.At 23, Louis Partridge would be a notably youngerBond than the other rumored contenders: Jacob Elordi (28), Callum Turner (36), Aaron Taylor-Johnson (35) and Harris Dickinson (29). He’d also skew younger than past Bonds when they started: Sean Connery (32), Daniel Craig (38), Pierce Brosnan (42) and Roger Moore (45).A younger Bond would also offer long-term upside: Partridge could anchor five or six films over 15 years and still be under 40, while also at a lower cost than bigger names like Elordi or Taylor-Johnson. And if Amazon execs are targeting early-20s talent, the competition is slim: Kit Connor (22), Joe Locke (23) and Noah Jupe (21) — unless they go with a relative unknown.After describingVariety’sreport to Partridge on the red carpet, he delivered a sharp smile and ended on a note of gratitude: “Wonderful. Thank you,Variety.”
title_zh: 詹姆斯·邦德候選人路易斯·帕特里奇(Louis Partridge)表示，他從未想過自己會成為007，但他認為能參與競爭是「美妙的」。
content_zh:
作者：安東尼奧·費爾梅(Antonio Ferme)

當Netflix在2020年推出首部《艾諾拉·霍姆斯》(Enola Holmes)時，觀眾見證了《怪奇物語》(Stranger Things)明星米莉·波比·布朗(Millie Bobby Brown)重新塑造自己，化身為這位古怪且打破第四面牆的偵探。他們還認識了一位新晉演員：路易斯·帕特里奇(Louis Partridge)。

六年後，在《艾諾拉·霍姆斯3》(Enola Holmes 3)的全球首映式上，帕特里奇表示他已學會以“各種方式”來應對名聲，“有時候做得比其他時候更好”。

“社交媒體的東西有時會變得有點吵，但身邊有好人是很重要的——老實說，弄清楚除了看手機之外什麼是重要的，這在如今的時代是相當困難的。我不會說謊，”帕特里奇在週四晚上告訴《綜藝》(Variety)。“聽起來很傻，但今天做到這一點相當棘手。”自從成為國際明星以來，帕特里奇已與業界重量級人物如凱特·布蘭琪(Cate Blanchett)同台演出，與普拉達(Prada)建立了合作關係，並與奧利維亞·羅德里戈(Olivia Rodrigo)展開了一段高調的戀情。回顧過去，他表示從未預料到自己的私生活會受到如此多的關注。“我沒有，但這是工作的一部分，我感激能感受到自己走在正確的道路上，”他解釋道。“我對自己目前的狀況感到滿意。我還有更多事情要做。”

這“更多事情要做”的不確定性主題中，還包括一個他從未想過好萊塢會考慮他的夢想角色：詹姆斯·邦德(James Bond)。當被問及他是否曾想過自己會參與007的競選時，帕特里奇回答：“不，不。至少還沒有。但這是值得考慮的事情。我想知道《綜藝》怎麼看？”

那麼，為了回答帕特里奇的問題，《綜藝》倫敦分社社長亞歷克斯·瑞特曼(Alex Ritman)在四月報導他是幾位有望爭取這個角色的演員之一，這與業界普遍的傳言一致，即亞馬遜MGM影業正在尋找一位“新面孔”的英國007。在23歲的年紀，路易斯·帕特里奇將成為比其他傳聞中的競爭者更年輕的邦德：雅各布·艾洛迪(Jacob Elordi)（28歲）、卡勒姆·特納(Callum Turner)（36歲）、亞倫·泰勒·約翰遜(Aaron Taylor-Johnson)（35歲）和哈里斯·迪金森(Harris Dickinson)（29歲）。他也比過去的邦德在開始時年輕：肖恩·康納利(Sean Connery)（32歲）、丹尼爾·克雷格(Daniel Craig)（38歲）、皮爾斯·布洛斯南(Pierce Brosnan)（42歲）和羅傑·摩爾(Roger Moore)（45歲）。年輕的邦德還提供了長期的潛力：帕特里奇可以在15年內主演五到六部電影，並且仍然不到40歲，同時成本也低於像艾洛迪或泰勒·約翰遜這樣的大牌。如果亞馬遜高管瞄準20出頭的人才，競爭就相對較小：基特·康納(Kit Connor)（22歲）、喬·洛克(Joe Locke)（23歲）和諾亞·朱普(Noah Jupe)（21歲）——除非他們選擇一位相對不知名的演員。在紅地毯上向帕特里奇描述《綜藝》的報導後，他露出了燦爛的微笑，並以感謝的語氣結束：“太好了。謝謝你，《綜藝》。”
summary_zh:
作者：安東尼奧·費爾梅(Antonio Ferme)

當Netflix在2020年推出首部《艾諾拉·霍姆斯》(Enola Holmes)時，觀眾見證了《怪奇物語》(Stranger Things)明星米莉·波比·布朗(Millie Bobby Brown)重新塑造自己，化身為這位古怪且打破第四面牆的偵探。他們還認識了一位新晉演員：路易斯·帕特里奇(Louis Partridge)。
